reviews.comment:
No respetan las promociones. Intente canjear la pelota por 500$ en full + puntos. Me dijeron NO tener código para hacerlo (no saben, en realidad no quieren, explicar porqué).
Solo canjean si cargas los 20lts.
Hace 2 días cargué 40lts y no tenían pelotas.
Respeten las promociones. No las usen de acuerdo a su conveniencia.

(Translated by Google)
They don't honor the promotions. I tried to redeem the ball for $500 in full + points. They told me they didn't have a code to do so (they don't know, or really, don't want to explain why).
They only redeem if you load the 20 liters.
Two days ago I loaded 40 liters and they didn't have any balls.
Respect the promotions. Don't use them at your convenience.

reviews.comment:
Está dentro de las peores estaciones del ACA. Fui varias veces y siempre hay problemas con algo: o los baños están clausurados, o no hay atención en el autoservicio, o no se puede estacionar porque están reparando algo, etc. La última vez "no tenían sistema" y no me hicieron el descuento de socio. Al reclamar, me dijeron que  con el ticket de compra tenía que ir a la Central para que me acreditaran el 5% del cargo, es decir, perder medio día, cruzarme toda la ciudad y hacer el reclamo para que me acreditasen $ 320. Inadmisible. No obstante ello, a la semana fui a la Central de Av. Libertador (pasaba cerca y quería comprobar si efectivamente me acreditaban el importe). Fue en vano, nadie sabía en dónde tenía que reclamar y cuando logré que me atendieran me dijeron que ya estaba vencido el plazo (cosa que nunca me aclararon en la estación de servicio). El mismo, teóricamente, era de 48 hs y fui a las 72 hs. Ridículo y frustrante. Hace más de 30 años que soy socio y fue un destrato absoluto. Es, definitivamente, una falta de respeto.

(Translated by Google)
It's one of the worst ACA stations. I've been there several times, and there's always a problem: either the restrooms are closed, or there's no service at the self-service counter, or parking is blocked because something's being repaired, etc. The last time they "didn't have a system" and wouldn't give me the member discount. When I complained, they told me I'd have to go to the Central Station with the purchase receipt to get a 5% credit, meaning I'd have to waste half a day, cross the entire city, and file a claim to get a credit of $320. Unacceptable. Nevertheless, a week later I went to the Central Station on Libertador Avenue (I was passing nearby and wanted to check if they would actually credit me the amount). It was in vain; no one knew where I should complain, and when I finally got help, they told me the deadline had already passed (something they never explained to me at the gas station). The deadline, theoretically, was 48 hours, and I went after 72 hours. Ridiculous and frustrating. I've been a member for over 30 years, and it was absolutely disrespectful. It's definitely disrespectful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCMDR5ZjFRRRAB
